prompt: Create a cinematic vertical bedroom scene showing Messi stepping out of an enormous glowing comic book portal. The room is a cozy football-fan bedroom at night, lit by warm LED strip lights around the ceiling and a desk lamp on the left, with shelves, posters, trading-card displays, scarves and banners in blue-red football club colors covering the walls. In the center-right, a giant open hardback comic book stands upright like a doorway, its cover reading “MESSI” in huge bold white letters and “THE CELESTIAL JOURNEY” beneath it, with small fake comic issue details on the left margin. The illustrated comic cover shows a cracked stadium scene, bright floodlights, a swirling electric blue vortex, flying paper shards, and a golden World Cup trophy floating inside the portal. The player is seen mostly from behind in an Argentina-style sky-blue-and-white striped jersey with “MESSI” and the number “10” on the back, black shorts, white socks, football boots, a captain armband, and tattooed arm, one foot still in the messy bedroom and the other moving into the glowing page; keep his face indistinct or softly obscured. Around the floor place exactly 9 visible scattered room items: 2 game controllers, 3 loose comic/magazine pages, 1 striped football shirt, 1 red garment, 1 green hoodie, and 1 small pile of broken white paper fragments near the book. Add blue magical particles and sparks spilling from the book onto the carpet. Use a dramatic ultra-detailed digital art style, realistic lighting mixed with comic-book illustration, deep perspective, high contrast teal-and-orange color grading, volumetric glow, sharp focus on the portal and jersey, vertical 9:16 composition, no watermark.
